description: next/ v4 — WMS stock unit (Quant) at the storage location, aligned to the LIVE projection of source sim-v5-wms-quants (article_ref/quantity/blocked/warehouse/storage_location), NOT the legacy base profile (article_no/quality_status). Keyed on quant_no. The cross-domain deviation material_unavailable (next/cross-constraints/material_unavailable.json) joins OperationsResponse <-> Quant on article_ref and aggregates the free stock (quantity, filtered to blocked==0). Pure stock carrier, no constraints block (cross-source).

attributes.name: quant_no
attributes.description: Unique Quant id (quant_id of the WMS row).

attributes.name: article_ref
attributes.description: Article (artikel_nr) — join key to Article / OperationsResponse for material availability.

attributes.name: quantity
attributes.description: Stock quantity (menge). For material availability it is summed filtered on blocked==0.

attributes.name: blocked
attributes.description: Block flag (gesperrt): 0 = freely available, !=0 = blocked. Filter for the material_unavailable aggregation (only free stock counts).

attributes.name: updated_at
attributes.description: Last change. Server-managed and volatile on every read (sim-v5 returns a fresh value per GET), so promotion:never — kept in the snapshot but excluded from the change-trigger and never published on its own.

stock_level_control_limits.description: IT/inventory control limits (Warngrenze (warning limit) + action limit) on the free stock quantity (reorder level / maximum stock level). Stock should stay inside the warn band [20,500]; below 20 or above 500 -> 'warning'-tier alarm (reorder / overstock watch); below the action band lower bound 5 or above 800 -> 'error'-tier alarm (stockout risk / hard overstock). Two-sided control band evaluated centrally by the it-evaluator (IT acquisition); drives the IT alarm panel with a raise/clear lifecycle. LITERAL band = static SSOT for the pilot.

isa95.note: Stock unit at the storage location = MaterialSublot (ISA-95 Part 2). Free/blocked (blocked) separates available from blocked stock for material availability (cross-domain ERP<->WMS, material_unavailable).
